positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a celestial night sky meeting a tranquil forest scene. The composition should feature strong, contrasting silhouettes of stylized deciduous trees and scattered abstract constellations forming recognizable constellations (like a stylized Great Bear or Orion). Use deep midnight blues, electric teal, vibrant nebula purples, and accents of glowing gold or soft yellow for the celestial elements. The forest silhouettes should be clean and crisp against the gradient sky. Style: Neo-Art Deco illustration meets modern folk art. Aspect ratio: 1:1. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, artifact, noise, dirty, low resolution, extra limbs, deformed, out of frame, signature, signature, messy, photographic
